tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8) jednym wyrazem, przeksztalcajac wyrazy podane w ramce tak, aby otrzymac logiczny i gramatycznie poprawny tekst. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.title: EXPLORING THE WORLD
tasks.text: Travelling to new places is one of the most 1.1. ________ experiences you can have. Before your 1.2. ________, it is important to gather useful 1.3. ________ about your destination. Many 1.4. ________ visit famous cities like Paris, Rome, and London every summer. Finding good 1.5. ________ is essential for a pleasant stay. A 1.6. ________ hotel room with a nice view makes any holiday better. Popular 1.7. ________ such as beautiful beaches and historic castles draw millions of visitors each year. For those who love 1.8. ________ holidays, activities like hiking, diving, and climbing are available in many countries. Every trip creates unforgettable memories.
